name: Can't Miss Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry red wine (may use white)
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the roast, then sprinkle with garlic powder and a little flour.
2. Brown the roast in a large skillet, then place it in a Dutch oven.
3. Crush the herbs and sprinkle over the roast. Place 1-2 bay leaves in the bottom of the pot.
4. Cover the roast with onions. Combine water and wine, then pour this liquid mixture over the roast, taking care not to wash off too many herbs.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1.5 hours. Add the potatoes and bake for another 30-45 minutes, or until tender.
6. Remove the roast, discard the bay leaves, and make gravy.
